known_cause: NON-FUNDAMENTAL: AMD climbed ~18% during the week the Trump administration announced a short-term postponement of U.S. tariffs on Chinese electronics, with the entire semiconductor complex rallying together on the macro headline. No AMD-specific announcement accompanied the move. Non-fundamental — AMD's products, customer commitments, and guidance didn't change; the rally was a sector-wide policy unwind that hit every chip name regardless of company-specific fundamentals, and it largely reversed within days when tariff anxiety returned.
